vs_past.delta: V flat (1→1); I→R drift (one inconclusive collapsed to refuted; s3 plan tool now emits plan_invalid error pre-emission instead of partial spawn_ack-only behaviour)

scenarios.reply_truncation: ok — reply contains [task_spawned] envelope followed by full aggregated synthesis (3 numbered points with header references to workspace.md and permission-model.md)
scenarios.notes: Clean run. 2 empty-response retries injected but recovered. Plan with 3 steps (read_permission_model, read_workspace, compare_docs) completed and aggregated.

scenarios.events_pass_reason: must_emit plan_emitted >=1 / plan_step_started >=2 / plan_step_completed >=2 all failed (0 occurrences). Router never invoked plan tool.
scenarios.reply_truncation: no truncation — reply is the router error string 'Router loop exceeded max iterations (5).' preceded by echoed tool names (list_actions, describe_action, source__read). No spawn_ack, no aggregated result.
scenarios.notes: Router exhausted iteration cap cycling list_actions/describe_action without ever calling plan. source__read tool_failed once. Classic non-plan-engagement attractor.

scenarios.events_pass_reason: must_emit plan_emitted >=1 / plan_step_started >=3 / plan_step_completed >=2 / plan_aggregated >=1 all failed (0 occurrences). plan tool invoked once but returned status=error kind=plan_invalid (steps_json malformed JSON: 'Expecting , delimiter: line 1 column 387').
scenarios.reply_truncation: TRUNCATED — HTTP A2A reply body is only 179 bytes containing the literal string 'plan\n\nplan' (two echoed tool-call names). Neither (a) spawn_ack envelope (no [task_spawned] header), NOR (b) aggregated result is present. Per B52-W6-2 finding re-measurement: plan_aggregated event absent in events.jsonl AND reply contains neither spawn_ack envelope nor aggregated synthesis. Root cause: plan_invalid JSON error fired before plan_emitted, so the lifecycle never started; the router fell through to returning raw tool-name echoes.
scenarios.notes: B52-W6-2 axis: this is a regression direction relative to B52 where s3 reportedly produced spawn_ack-only (no aggregated). B53 produces NEITHER spawn_ack NOR aggregated — reply degenerates to bare tool-name echoes. Underlying LLM JSON serialisation of plan.steps_json appears unreliable for the 3-file synthesis prompt.

new_findings.summary: plan tool rejects LLM-emitted steps_json with 'Expecting , delimiter: line 1 column 387' for s3. plan_emitted never fires; HTTP reply degenerates to literal 'plan\n\nplan' (= echoed tool-call names), no spawn_ack envelope, no aggregated content.
primary_evidence: events.jsonl tool_returned.result = {status: error, error: {kind: plan_invalid, message: 'plan.steps_json is not valid JSON: Expecting , delimiter: line 1 column 387 (char 386)'}}
Zero plan_* events in s3 events.jsonl

new_findings.summary: Router cycles list_actions/describe_action 4x without invoking plan tool, then hits source__read error and exits via 'Router loop exceeded max iterations (5).' No plan lifecycle events. Suggests planner-trigger heuristic does not match this prompt phrasing.
primary_evidence: events: 4× tool_called (list_actions/describe_action), 0× plan tool invocation, 1× tool_failed source__read
Reply text: 'Router loop exceeded max iterations (5).'
